strPledgeAdd.description: Pledge added to [us] when this interaction executes. Refers to entry within pledges.json.

strPledgeAddThem.description: Pledge added to [them] when this interaction executes. Refers to entry within pledges.json.

CTTestRoom.description: Condition trigger applied to the room context. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json. (Per IVerifiable / JsonInteraction.GetVerifiables.)

LootVFXUs.description: Visual effect loot applied to [us]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootVFXThem.description: Visual effect loot applied to [them]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAudioUs.description: Audio loot applied to [us]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAudioThem.description: Audio loot applied to [them]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAddFactionsUs.description: Faction-add loot applied to [us]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAddFactionsThem.description: Faction-add loot applied to [them]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAddCondRulesUs.description: CondRule-add loot applied to [us]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

LootAddCondRulesThem.description: CondRule-add loot applied to [them]. Refers to entry within loot.json.

ShipTestUs.description: Ship spec test applied to [us]'s ship. Refers to entry within shipspecs.json. (Per IVerifiable / JsonInteraction.GetVerifiables.)

ShipTestThem.description: Ship spec test applied to [them]'s ship. Refers to entry within shipspecs.json.

ShipTest3rd.description: Ship spec test applied to [3rd]'s ship. Refers to entry within shipspecs.json.

strPledgeRemove.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp; preserved in case mods, future updates, or older docs reference it.] Was hypothesized as a pledge-removal counterpart to strPledgeAdd; the C# class only declares strPledgeAdd / strPledgeAddThem. If you need to remove a pledge in an interaction, look for another mechanism (e.g. CTTest* + condition-based removal). Refers to entry within pledges.json.

pledge.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp; preserved as wiki convention.] Wiki documents this as 'The pledge from pledges.json related to this interaction, if any; null if none' but the C# class has only strPledgeAdd / strPledgeAddThem. Refers to entry within pledges.json.

strLootCTsGive.description: [GHOST: not on JsonInteraction (JSON DTO). Lives on runtime Interaction.cs as a field populated by parsing aLootItms[i] when verb=='give'. As a JSON-level reference, prefer aLootItms entries. Refers to entry within loot.json.]

bDestroyItem.description: [GHOST: not on JsonInteraction. On runtime Interaction.cs, populated from aLootItms boolean parameter at index [3] for some verbs.]
